title: Implement a slugify() helper
prompt: textutil.py has a function slugify(text) that currently raises NotImplementedError. Implement it so that it: lowercases the text; replaces every run of non-alphanumeric characters (spaces, punctuation, underscores, slashes, etc.) with a single hyphen; and strips leading/trailing hyphens. For example 'Hello, World!' -> 'hello-world' and 'AI/ML & PM' -> 'ai-ml-pm'.
prompt_paraphrase: In textutil.py, slugify(text) currently throws NotImplementedError. Please implement it: convert the text to lowercase, collapse each run of non-alphanumeric characters (spaces, punctuation, underscores, slashes, and so on) into a single hyphen, and remove any hyphens at the start or end. So 'Hello, World!' becomes 'hello-world' and 'AI/ML & PM' becomes 'ai-ml-pm'.
